name: styles/pop
title: Pop
description: Playful loud-and-friendly art direction: cream ground, coral and electric-blue accents, Bricolage Grotesque display type, thick ink borders with sticker shadows, and a springy rise-and-bounce motion signature.
styleTone: playful, loud, friendly; cream with saturated accents
useCases: product launches, community talks, workshop energy
any deck that should feel like a poster, not a report

motion.notes: Springy rises with overshoot easing (cubic-bezier 0.34/1.56); children fade opacity-only per the choreography rule. Bounce is the signature — do not flatten it.

icons.guidance: Bold sprite icons in ink inside sticker badges; emoji is allowed only when the deck deliberately opts in with data-ls-icons="emoji".

attributes.name: data-ls-style
attributes.description: Activates the pop art direction for the whole deck.

usage: Set data-ls-style="pop" on the <html> element and load style.css plus the font.css of each font family dependency.
Use exactly one style per deck; styles replace the v1 theme presets.
